title: Otis operator identity and working preferences
body: User profile memory: the user/operator is Otis Duncan. Working preference memory: keep XV7 records fresh and XV7-native; do not bulk import XV6.1 records.

facts.statement: Do not migrate, copy, or bulk import XV6.1 knowledge records.
XV6.1 may be used as historical reference only.

evidence: User explicitly requested identity memory for Otis Duncan in B8.2.
